name: 2026-06-03 Economic & Utility Reform Meralco Rate Reset Delay TH
description:
Meralco wants P2.34 per kWh in distribution charges. The current approved rate is P1.35.

A 73% jump on a line item no household ever signed.

Hindi tayo dapat sanay sa mediocre.

The ERC was supposed to rule this month. Now pushed to July. Possibly September.

8.2 million households wait. The bills do not.

Meralco wants P2.34 per kWh in distribution charges. The current approved rate is P1.35.

A 73% jump on a line item no household ever signed.

Hindi tayo dapat sanay sa mediocre.

The ERC was supposed to rule this month. Now pushed to July. Possibly September.

8.2 million households wait. The bills do not.

Philstar (2026-06-03, 'Meralco rate reset ruling faces delay') and BusinessWorld (2026-06-02, 'ERC rate review for Meralco faces delay'): ERC Chairman Francis Saturnino C. Juan confirms decision on Meralco's first regulatory period (2027-2030) will slip from June target to July at the earliest for the first entry group, with Meralco's case potentially landing as late as September. Meralco's application: distribution tariff of P2.34/kWh (up from P1.35/kWh approved rate), P532.13B revenue program, P272B capex program.
